textByHash.7a3a425859a1661500a55fa7aa0689e76420ac12: Oh look, it's the human. Hello human.
textByHash.f3328d534e17a0a873f709643d9d56e9c01a52c2: Oh. Well you really should speak to Councillor Unkar. He's part of the Council, you know.
textByHash.c29575173601981a429bb8116282d5cb396648f2: Ah yes, the Council business at Xeric's Lookout. I will come at once, but first...
textByHash.1e7fff9685b6014248a1196a2f7347dae30678cb: Yes, yes. Come to Xeric's Lookout. I'll be there as soon as I've finished this sherry.
textByHash.57de22fc2405403930bc8934f8a89819d788c8da: Well... I don't really understand. The Council rule Kourend. We can't just take over.
textByHash.7aadbd508cd4da804b643f7b2e74811106fd352c: Goodness... I think I need a sherry.
textByHash.9cf0bf16b37116af0997cc5c40057a576c255816: Oh, it's the human. Hello human.
textByHash.715108fad4e82e95a47f68ddc6ccb0c51e3d65ae: Ah yes, the new Royal Accord. Well Councillor Unkar has been a good dwarf his whole life. He can't be involved in any of this.
textByHash.1cf6fce132ff87ab63cf5af06972f093c34f6027: No, no, no. That's not right at all. You must be getting confused somewhere. Councillor Andrews is the problem.
textByHash.cfaa7882cac066a64d54401a64b4003eb6d3a713: Oh, I know! We can replace Councillor Andrews with Councillor Unkar. What an excellent idea! This calls for a sherry.
textByHash.168a4ff31c40bb92fcb0b171bfcfe5f6e615b847: Well you can't go believing Councillor Orson! He's clearly just jealous of Councillor Unkar's success.
textByHash.e86f72792ee38b60d2912ccb467544c51c338e74: Oh... well I suppose so, but I don't think you'll find any. Councillor Unkar is innocent.
textByHash.2a9d2d7ef842dc66233f65ce0689d892f70070c0: Okay human. I'm sure you'll soon see that Councillor Unkar is innocent.
textByHash.9865d7c17aa86e4e5ec43da25bb94136f0b399df: The Council wanted to remove me from power? They can't do that! It's not their right!
textByHash.73e27313ccd9b519918f1d2657ec8ca4ecbeba5a: Yes... I understand. I will support this Royal Accord.
textByHash.ecd63974e372867cf4a506921dc69f8368c2e3cb: Oh... No. Leave that for someone else.
textByHash.5a0f653b92a62810bf1f8d56545d309215daf4e1: Well... This is all quite something. I suppose the Council have to go though, don't they?
textByHash.1775f9dac20aa341652779ecf9153b55e52ae457: Oh... No, I don't think so. I think I'll have a sherry instead.
textByHash.34a227bf0326936c157f8a95fb20df09fddeb231: He can do it, I suppose.
textByHash.003e58513486d42053aead8da64708b2fc7f90f1: Oh, it's the human. Shouldn't you be speaking with Commander Fullore?
textByHash.c11dcd5c88604cdd65b7137bb761616d76973474: Greatest urgency? I don't like urgency. This is quite simply not on.
textByHash.60e95d1ae7b27d7cf51649ee04e5a92b91989b44: Who is this human, Councillor Unkar? What are they doing here?
textByHash.108b8d5571dbc0f562c1c5613edae9361cdec641: Oh. Could you make them go away?
textByHash.4fc21dbd7ef67e4f81258eeff7642033073232cd: Well I've never heard of them. What do they want?
textByHash.8a3b4d4eb202c8fdc5e821ba35492d391d6cc14b: A quest? Well we don't have any of those lying around.
textByHash.829926093684e2fb5e279605e2e1d2c68d85abb4: Ah yes, the urgent matter with the Doors of Dinh. Very clever Councillor Unkar. You put the human to work. I need a sherry.
textByHash.439b4967740f32c81927dd72da656743acce05f2: Oh. Could you make them go away then?
textByHash.4a0708fc308733f7501a8534d2149fd6e80e0f16: The human seems a bit lost Councillor. Could you help them please.
textByHash.d16c80418f2fa01e6facdf57b8f6d363f6254fda: That we did Councillor. Quite right. And what was it that Undor needed?
textByHash.7ec7f0d88a122dff5d4bc4209f3fd3226d59289d: Yes, yes, wonderful stuff. I think I'll have a sherry to celebrate.
textByHash.5101408584c37bf5a06a48f1ec81eff92e0e0a6f: Councillor, why is the human still here?
textByHash.25b6c9d1331e1a169be6d898205096c87ae5a863: Well here you go, have this then.
textByHash.9f4251436bbb26f5366df4119fe529ef6a920f98: Oh. The human is still here.
textByHash.cff34da4e95d19af042ac68b75bf9920178e8e1f: Well I'm Vulcana Lovakengj, the head of Lovakengj House. I rule the city of Lovakengj.
textByHash.29a6b90a44fabe48eba6bc21f71911906b90c0ff: Oh... No I don't think so.
textByHash.5a4d5e3037c8c0e93c9ab5f2ac1b2cce9f2a6e1f: Yes! I know a lot about Lovakengj!
textByHash.9c14fcc9c826129d0f2572b417a04cdb4d667b12: Lovakengj is a city of dwarves. It's the only non-human city in Kourend.
textByHash.e97fe2a803657b7212ec19c8a13a308b53e2a5ff: Lovakengj is very important you know. The resources mined here are used throughout the kingdom. Weapons, armour, tools, buildings...
textByHash.1406a6578e8213fc484c1b2786f975739ba14aa5: All sorts of things come out of Lovakengj.
textByHash.d1d4615cec7d38a531dc9eaa662c202c8112ff04: My plans? Hmm let me see now...
textByHash.ac3d5e11eefbbfccd6c2046943520de1b3907d3f: Ah, I know. I'll have a sherry.
textByHash.bb7ac32ef0a3abd6572bec73df57fbdd2d0760c6: Apparently you need a reward or something? Here you go.
